title: Executive Member
comment:
- Focusing on leading full-stack web projects both internal and freelance as of 2026
- Designing bootcamps for people who are interested in web technologies and want to get involved
- Leading a team of 8 people with project guidance, feedbacks and code reviews while also holding weekly meetings where we constantly update and learn from eachother.
- Exploring, learning and experimenting on new technologies to use within both internal and outsource projects while improving myself.

Delivered Projects:
- Foundations Frontend Web Development Certification Course
- In-house Event Management Platform built around Cloudflare Ecosystem
- Learning Management Systems to support our education platform MultiAcademy for better student guidance and communication
- Internal Mailing Management Platform to help our team control marketing mailings systematically
